mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.title, p.start_date, p.end_date, p.max_people, p.view_count, p.status, p.created_at FROM posts p WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY p.id DESC

SELECT p.id, p.title, p.start_date, p.end_date, p.max_people, p.view_count, p.status, p.created_at, u.user_name, f.created_at AS favorited_at FROM favorites f JOIN posts p ON f.post_id = p.id JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY f.id DESC

SELECT cr.id, cr.post_id, cr.message, cr.status, cr.created_at, p.title, p.start_date, p.end_date, u.user_name AS post_owner_name FROM companion_requests cr JOIN posts p ON cr.post_id = p.id JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE cr.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY cr.id DESC
